hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE 'frontend/src/.*[.](ts|tsx)$'; then cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -20 && npx eslint "$f" 2>&1 | tail -10; elif echo "$f" | grep -qE 'backend/src/.*[.](ts|tsx)$'; then if [ -f backend/package.json ]; then cd backend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -20 && npx eslint "$f" 2>&1 | tail -10; fi; fi; }

failed=0; cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 || failed=1; npx eslint src/ 2>&1 || failed=1; cd ..; if [ -f backend/package.json ]; then cd backend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 || failed=1; npx eslint src/ 2>&1 || failed=1; fi; if [ $failed -ne 0 ]; then printf '{"decision":"block","reason":"TypeScript 类型检查或 ESLint 失败，请修复后再提交"}'; fi
